response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and formal project management — critical for this role — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level.
strengths: Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public libraries
Extensive full-stack experience across languages, platforms, and Linux environments
Proven mentorship and workshop delivery in testing, TDD, and web internals
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal project management experience
Lacks clear track record in client-facing advisory or requirements management for IT consulting
